name: Claim denied because 'not serious enough' in Holladay, can I fight it?
description: Appeal with treatment proof; many win.[1]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied because 'not serious enough' in Holladay, can I fight it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal with treatment proof; many win.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, appeal showing ongoing treatment, lost work, impairment; Utah comp covers even minor if work-related. Burden on you initially.[1] Key factors: new doctor reports, functional limits proof. File ALJ hearing, subpoena records; win reinstatement. Denials often overturned.
